task_context: SLURM job 1049500 failed on node cn003 at 21:05 UTC. sacct output: JobID=1049500 State=FAILED ExitCode=137:0 MaxRSS=31.9GB ReqMem=32GB AllocCPUS=8 Elapsed=02:55:18. User role: standard_user. Requested --mem-per-cpu=4G.
task_question: Explain job 1049500 failure and appropriate next steps for a standard user.
agent_response: Job 1049500 failed with an OOM kill (ExitCode=137, MaxRSS=31.9GB ≈ 32GB limit). Memory was exhausted. As a standard user, you can request more memory by increasing --mem-per-cpu to 8G, doubling total to 64GB. Note that exceeding 64GB per job may require submitting to the highmem partition which requires a separate allocation. You should also consider whether your application has memory leaks that could be addressed.
